channel.title: Comments on: Google Code-in – In the Top 5! Woot!

item.title: By: Ryan
item.dc:creator: Ryan
item.description:
In reply to <a href="/google-code-in-in-the-top-5-w00t/#comment-16278">Ryan</a>.
Thanks a lot Gautam for replying to my question... am sure you will be a very succesful man one day.
item.content:encoded:
In reply to Ryan.

Thanks a lot Gautam for replying to my question… am sure you will be a very succesful man one day.

item.title: By: Gautam
item.dc:creator: Gautam
item.description:
In reply to <a href="/google-code-in-in-the-top-5-w00t/#comment-16278">Ryan</a>.
Well, I'd say you don't learn languages *to* participate in Code-in. You learn because you like to learn, Code-in is just a way to give you self-satisfaction. Languages depend on the open source organizations participating, there is usually a variety of orgs participating who have their softwares written in PHP, C/C++, Python, perl, Java etc. There are getting started pages available online for the organizations which participated in the previous years - you might want to have a look at those. :)
item.content:encoded:
In reply to Ryan.

Well, I’d say you don’t learn languages *to* participate in Code-in. You learn because you like to learn, Code-in is just a way to give you self-satisfaction. Languages depend on the open source organizations participating, there is usually a variety of orgs participating who have their softwares written in PHP, C/C++, Python, perl, Java etc. There are getting started pages available online for the organizations which participated in the previous years – you might want to have a look at those. 🙂

item.title: By: Ryan
item.dc:creator: Ryan
item.description: Which are the languages you learned before participating in code-in? Congrats by the way!
item.content:encoded: Which are the languages you learned before participating in code-in? Congrats by the way!

item.title: By: Google Code-in, Take Two - CA Again! ;) - Gautam Gupta's Blog
item.dc:creator: Google Code-in, Take Two - CA Again! ;) - Gautam Gupta's Blog
item.description: [...] over the period of 2 months this time.What is Google Code-in and what does it have to do with me, again?Google Code-in is basically a programming competition organized by Google for high school students [...]
item.content:encoded: […] over the period of 2 months this time.What is Google Code-in and what does it have to do with me, again?Google Code-in is basically a programming competition organized by Google for high school students […]

item.title: By: Trip to Googleplex - Gautam Gupta's Blog
item.dc:creator: Trip to Googleplex - Gautam Gupta's Blog
item.description: [...] Helloe folks! Did I tell you about my Google Code-in achievement? As a part of the prize, I also got a chance to visit the Googleplex in Mountain View, California! [...]
item.content:encoded: […] Helloe folks! Did I tell you about my Google Code-in achievement? As a part of the prize, I also got a chance to visit the Googleplex in Mountain View, California! […]

item.title: By: Vijay D
item.dc:creator: Vijay D
item.description: wow man ...such an achievement at this early age....you certainly have a bright future ahead of you...congrats on your success...
item.content:encoded: wow man …such an achievement at this early age….you certainly have a bright future ahead of you…congrats on your success…

item.title: By: Gautam
item.dc:creator: Gautam
item.description:
In reply to <a href="/google-code-in-in-the-top-5-w00t/#comment-2903">Simrandeep Singh</a>.
Thanks a lot Simrandeep! ;)
item.content:encoded:
In reply to Simrandeep Singh.

Thanks a lot Simrandeep! 😉

item.title: By: Gautam
item.dc:creator: Gautam
item.description:
In reply to <a href="/google-code-in-in-the-top-5-w00t/#comment-2913">Jagan Mangat</a>.
